visionMasterMaxDark.bigTitle: So what defines a true home theater?
visionMasterMaxDark.description:
See what others miss. VisionMaster banishes washed-out grays, revealing true
blacks and flawless details with exceptional contrast—for uncompromising 
cinematic wonder.

visionMasterMaxDark.title: True Hollywood Black. No Compromise on Details.
